_comment: KART KAPITOL — Central content file. Edit any value here and reload the page to see changes. The app.js file reads this on every load and injects everything into the site.

site.name: Kart Kapitol
site.tagline: Marshalltown, Iowa's esports portfolio — built for the community, shown to the world.

items: Esports Give Back — Big Brothers Big Sisters

home.lead: The center of Iowa's esports scene. Where high school rivals compete, communities connect, and Marshalltown earns its place on the national map.
home.orgsTitle: Built by real people. Powered by Marshalltown.
home.orgsLead: Three organizations form the backbone of Iowa's most active community esports scene — each playing a different role in building something that lasts.

orgs.name: IAHSEA
orgs.desc: The state's premiere organization connecting high school esports programs across Iowa. IAHSEA hosts the landmark State Showdown — bringing hundreds of students to Marshalltown to compete on a stage built for them.

orgs.name: MHS
orgs.desc: Home team pride. MHS students compete at the high school level, represent Marshalltown in regional events, and are the heartbeat of the local youth esports pipeline — from after school to state competition.

orgs.name: MCC
orgs.desc: The collegiate tier. MCC provides a competitive and educational pathway for esports athletes, building on what begins in high school and creating careers — in play, production, and the business of esports.

home.eventsLead: From weekly tournaments to statewide showcases — Marshalltown's esports calendar stays full. Check in, show up, and be part of it.
home.featuredEventDesc: Iowa's premier high school esports championship. Hosted right here in Marshalltown — 94 captured moments from November 2025 and counting.
home.givebackLead: Gaming is the vehicle. Community is the destination. Marshalltown's esports scene is woven into the fabric of the city — from schools to shelters to the library shelf.

givebackStats.label: Community Organizations
givebackStats.desc: Esports Give Back programs actively partnering with Marshalltown nonprofits and services.

givebackStats.label: Programs & Pathways
givebackStats.desc: From Big Brothers Big Sisters mentorship to after-school library sessions — esports is reaching kids where they are.

givebackStats.label: Statewide Reach
givebackStats.desc: IAHSEA community programs extend Marshalltown's impact to students across the entire state of Iowa.

givebackStats.label: To Everyone
givebackStats.desc: You don't need to be a player. Events, watch parties, and community nights are family-friendly and open to all.

home.mechdyneDesc: A Marshalltown-based technology powerhouse, Mechdyne brings world-class visualization and immersive tech to the esports space. Their investment in the local scene elevates every event and signals to the country: Marshalltown means business.
home.galleryLead: 94 official photos from the IAHSEA State Showdown. Real moments, real players, real Marshalltown energy.

galleryPhotos.label: State Showdown 2025
galleryPhotos.alt: State Showdown — players competing on stage

home.visitCtaLead: Whether you're driving in for a tournament or booking a weekend around the scene — this is a city building something worth the trip.

exhibits.lead: Five exhibits. One community. The rise of Marshalltown esports — curated, visitor-first, and built to last.
exhibits.hallTitle: Pick a wing. Enter the exhibit.
exhibits.hallLead: Each exhibit opens a curated display panel exploring a different dimension of Marshalltown's esports story.

exhibits.title: Exhibit A: The Rise
exhibits.desc: How esports grew into a real community presence in Marshalltown — from first sparks to statewide recognition.

exhibits.title: Exhibit B: The Arena
exhibits.desc: Venues, events, broadcasts, and watch parties — the live environments where esports becomes a shared experience.

exhibits.title: Exhibit C: The People
exhibits.desc: Organizers, creators, volunteers, and the community that shows up behind the scenes every single time.

exhibits.title: Exhibit D: The Impact
exhibits.desc: Education, careers, tourism, and measurable local value — esports as a force that extends beyond gameplay.

exhibits.title: Exhibit E: Highlights
exhibits.desc: Rotating wall of moments: photos, clips, winners, and recaps from across the seasons.

exhibits.title: Curated Standards
exhibits.desc: This exhibit is designed to feel intentional — concise, shareable, visitor-first. Read about the vision.

exhibits.timelineLead: A guided walk through key moments. Tap a plaque to open the display.

milestones.title: Milestone 1
milestones.desc: Origin moment — the first spark that started local momentum.

milestones.title: Milestone 2
milestones.desc: First big event — a turning point that brought people together.

milestones.title: Milestone 3
milestones.desc: Broadcast era — production, streaming, and shareable moments.

milestones.title: Milestone 4
milestones.desc: Community expansion — new partnerships, venues, and formats.

milestones.title: Milestone 5
milestones.desc: Recognition — a highlight worth framing on the wall.

milestones.title: Milestone 6
milestones.desc: The next chapter — what Marshalltown is building toward.

exhibits.collectionsLead: Organized like a museum — artifacts, media, and stories ready to grow.

events.lead: Live calendar + museum archive. Featured moments up front, everything else organized and ready for visitors.
events.showdownLead: 94 official photos from Iowa's premier high school esports event · November 2025 · Photography by Altar Media
events.featuredLead: Highlighted for visitors and press — the events that define the season.
events.upcomingLead: Perfect for "Plan Your Visit." Check what's coming, then show up.
events.archiveLead: Documented moments that build Marshalltown's esports story.

visit.lead: Build a trip around esports moments — showcases, watch parties, live production, and community energy you won't find anywhere else.
visit.expectDesc: Kart Kapitol is built like an exhibit: curated, visitor-first, and easy to explore. You don't need to be a gamer — think of it like a live sports night with a modern twist.
expectChecklist: Great for visitors who want something different
Weekly Smash Bros tournaments — open to all
visit.pathsLead: Keep it simple. Make it memorable.

paths.title: Quick Stop
paths.desc: Catch one featured event, grab a photo, and head out with a story worth telling.

paths.title: Weekend Build
paths.desc: Two events, one exhibit deep dive, and a local hangout spot — a full Marshalltown experience.

paths.title: Tourism Highlight
paths.desc: Plan around one "big wall" featured event and share the recap with the world.

visit.checklistLead: Small steps that make the trip smoother.
beforeGo: Check date, time, and location on the Events page
Confirm parking and entry for the venue
Bring a charger — you'll take photos
whileThere: Snap a highlight moment to share

partners.lead: Esports is a tourism story when the community builds it together. Venues, sponsors, schools, local business — everyone has a lane.
partners.whyDesc: Kart Kapitol exists to spotlight Marshalltown's esports ecosystem as a living portfolio. Partnerships turn events into visitor experiences — something the town can be proud of and share with the country.
whyChecklist: Supports youth programs and education pathways
Builds local business visibility and involvement
Generates shareable media and town identity
Puts Marshalltown on the national esports map
partners.mechdyneDesc: A Marshalltown-based technology company specializing in visualization, immersive environments, and simulation. Mechdyne's investment in the local esports scene elevates every event — and proves that Marshalltown's esports story has the full support of local industry.
partners.tracksLead: Easy for local orgs to plug in — whatever level works for you.

tracks.title: Venue Partner
tracks.desc: Provide space for events, watch parties, showcases, or community workshops.

tracks.title: Sponsor
tracks.desc: Support production, prizes, promotion, or travel and tourism moments.

tracks.title: Community Partner
tracks.desc: Help connect youth programs, schools, and community engagement initiatives.

tracks.title: Signature Event Partner
tracks.desc: Build one "big wall" event each season that visitors can plan a trip around.

tracks.title: Give Back Partner
tracks.desc: Connect your nonprofit or service org with Marshalltown's esports Give Back events.

tracks.title: Media Partner
tracks.desc: Amplify the story. Coverage, photography, and broadcast partnership opportunities.

curator.title: Curator's Note
curator.body:
Kart Kapitol is Marshalltown's visitor-facing esports portfolio.

It blends tourism, community storytelling, and event presentation into a digital experience worthy of the scene we've built here.

press.title: Media & Press Kit
press.body:
Recommended story angles:

  • Esports as a community and tourism attraction
  • Student-led media and production
  • Visitor-friendly events and showcases
  • Local partnerships and regional growth
  • Mechdyne: tech industry meets grassroots esports

contact.title: Partnership Inquiry
contact.body:
Interested in partnering with Kart Kapitol? We'd love to connect.

Reach out about hosting, sponsorship, venue support, or collaborative programming.

submit.title: Submit an Event or Artifact
submit.body:
Use this space for a form, QR link, or submission email.

For the client demo, this acts as a placeholder for future community submissions.

itinerary.title: Sample Visit Itinerary
itinerary.body:
Friday: Arrival, local dinner, community watch party.

Saturday: Featured event, exhibit browsing, media / photo moments.

Sunday: Brunch, final stops, archive recap.

map.title: Visitor Map
map.body: Coming soon — a guide to venues, event sites, watch-party locations, and community partner spaces across Marshalltown.

exhibitRise.title: Exhibit A: The Rise
exhibitRise.body: How esports became a visible and organized part of the Marshalltown story — from first sparks to statewide recognition.

exhibitArena.title: Exhibit B: The Arena
exhibitArena.body: The spaces, setups, and live environments where esports becomes a shared experience. Venues, streams, and the crowd that makes it electric.

exhibitPeople.title: Exhibit C: The People
exhibitPeople.body: The organizers, creators, students, coaches, and supporters behind every event. Marshalltown runs on real people who show up.

exhibitImpact.title: Exhibit D: The Impact
exhibitImpact.body: Education, leadership, tourism, community pride, and measurable local value — esports as a force beyond gameplay.

exhibitHighlights.title: Exhibit E: Highlights
exhibitHighlights.body: A wall of featured moments, media, and milestones worth revisiting. The story so far.
